content.text: The annual company conference will be held next month at the Riverside Convention Center. Employees from all regional offices are invited to attend. The event will feature guest speakers, workshops, and networking opportunities. Registration will remain open until the end of this week. Please contact Human Resources if you have any questions.
Describe everything you see in the picture. Mention the people, objects, and actions taking place.
How often do you travel for vacation?
What is your favorite destination you have visited, and why?
Do you think online learning is as effective as classroom learning? Why or why not?
Write one sentence based on the picture using the words 'computer' and 'meeting'.

You work for a hotel. Read the email below and respond.

Dear Manager,

During my recent stay, the internet connection in my room was extremely slow, making it difficult for me to work. I reported the issue, but it was not resolved before I checked out. I would appreciate an explanation and information regarding compensation.

Regards,
Sarah Brown

In your response, apologize, explain the issue, and offer a solution.
Some people believe that having a good work-life balance is more important than earning a high salary. Write an essay of at least 300 words discussing your opinion.

The city library will host a book fair this Saturday. Visitors can meet local authors and attend writing workshops throughout the day. Special discounts will be available on selected books. Families are encouraged to participate in the children's reading activities. Admission to the event is free.
